home.title: Gendron & Kastner Immobilier Inc. - Multi-Unit Investment in Gatineau–Hull

splitVideoSection.title: Our Latest Project
splitVideoSection.intro: Our latest acquisition is a triplex near Casino du Lac-Leamy. Planned work includes:
splitVideoSection.outro: Energy-efficiency upgrades using programs like Rénoclimat & CMHC Eco Improvement.

cardGridSection.title: Our Approach
cardGridSection.paragraph1: Acquiring multi-unit properties in Gatineau–Hull, analyzing financials, location, and renovation potential to find long-term value opportunities.
cardGridSection.paragraph2: Managing properties directly, handling maintenance, renovations, tenant relations, and operations to maintain high standards.
cardGridSection.paragraph3: Improving properties through strategic renovations and refinements, increasing value and refinancing to fund future acquisitions.

contactCTA.title: Interested in working with us?
contactCTA.subtitle: Questions about our work, opportunities, or partnerships? We’d be happy to talk.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Working today for a future with more freedom.

teamGridSection.subtitle: One vision, shaped by different strengths and paths.
teamGridSection.imageAlt1: Loïc Gendron, co-founder of Gendron & Kastner Immobilier
teamGridSection.imageAlt2: Caleb Kastner, co-founder of Gendron & Kastner Immobilier

cardCarouselSection.title: Our Vision
cardCarouselSection.paragraph1: We see real estate as a path to independence and control over our time and energy, rather than working toward someone else’s goals.
cardCarouselSection.paragraph2: While we are currently two partners, we aim to grow into a wider network of collaborators who build and succeed with us.
cardCarouselSection.paragraph3: Being young gives us flexibility to learn, take calculated risks, and build steadily. This is a long-term way of life, not just a project.
